settings.heading: Our Story
settings.text: VELLOR was born from the belief that everyday essentials should feel extraordinary. We set out to create a line of premium fleece pieces that bridge the gap between luxury and comfort.

settings.title: Premium Materials
settings.text: Heavyweight 400gsm fleece, sourced from the finest mills. Every thread chosen with intention.

settings.title: Garment Dyed
settings.text: Each piece is individually dyed after construction for a rich, unique depth of color.

settings.title: Made to Last
settings.text: Reinforced stitching, quality hardware, and fabrics that get softer with every wash.
